hero.title: Building CaribAI in public through engineering practice, reflection, and steady progress.
hero.description: This page shares the real path behind CaribAI: what is being learned, what is being built, and how the ecosystem is becoming stronger through AI implementation, systems thinking, machine learning exploration, and visible progress.

focus.title: What is actively being learned, tested, and improved

items.title: AI Implementation
items.description: APIs, model integrations, structured outputs, and practical workflows that support useful AI-powered systems and software.

items.title: Systems Building
items.description: Sharpening how problems are identified, solutions are designed, and ideas are turned into stronger systems over time.

items.title: Machine Learning Growth
items.description: Strengthening the systems, habits, and technical depth needed to support long-term machine learning exploration and intelligent systems work.

documentation.title: The real parts of growth that usually stay hidden
documentation.description: The goal is not to present a polished illusion. It is to show how engineering ability is actually built through practice, mistakes, revisions, and visible momentum.

items.title: Technical Lessons
items.description: Notes from backend engineering, AI integrations, data handling, automation thinking, ML exploration, and product development workflows.

items.title: Challenges and Setbacks
items.description: What broke, what took longer than expected, what needed rethinking, and what those moments taught along the way.

items.title: Implementation Milestones
items.description: New tools learned, systems tested, features shipped, infrastructure improved, and clearer strategic direction earned over time.

future.title: Building a practical foundation now for deeper AI systems and future expansion.

items.title: Now
items.description: AI implementation, backend development, digital infrastructure, and stronger systems thinking across the ecosystem.

items.title: Next
items.description: Better deployment workflows, stronger automation, deeper ML experimentation, and more polished launches.

items.title: Later
items.description: More advanced AI systems, broader software directions, and carefully earned expansion into higher-complexity research and infrastructure opportunities.

cta.title: See the stack and tools behind the journey.
cta.description: Explore the technologies I’m building with and the ones I’m actively learning next.
